name: Border guesser
description: Hold a button to progressively reveal a mystery country's border, with its continent given as a hint. Guess the country as early as you can: the less of the outline shown when you answer correctly, the higher your score. Work through 7 countries to finish.

name: Beatdle
description: Listen to a drum beat, then recreate its rhythm on a 16-step sequencer across 3 tracks — kick, snare, and hi-hat. You can replay the target only once per guess, so memorize it. After each submission, every cell is marked correct, misplaced, or absent, Wordle-style, until you reproduce the full pattern within 6 attempts.

name: BallotGuessr
description: You get dropped into a Google Street View somewhere in the U.S. and read the surroundings — architecture, businesses, signs, landscape — for political clues. Drag a slider between a strong Democratic and a strong Republican lean to predict how that county voted in the 2024 presidential election. The closer your guess, the more points you bank across 5 timed rounds.

name: Prince Chazz
description: You control a crowned piece that moves like a chess queen, any distance in a straight line or diagonal. Land on an enemy to capture it for a point, but each capture spawns 2 more, and every enemy moves like a chess piece (rook, knight, bishop) that hunts you after your turn. Rocks block your path, and a single enemy landing on you ends the run. Plan your moves and chain captures to push your score as high as you can.

name: Last Control
description: Answer 9 rapid multiple-choice brain-teasers against a 60-second clock, spanning mental arithmetic, pattern completion, short-term memory recall, cipher decoding, and flag/trivia recall. Each correct answer raises your score out of 100, and you finish with a streak and a shareable result grid, all framed as a dystopian "cognitive audit".

name: Ballot Blocks
description: Look around a U.S. neighborhood in Google Street View and use a slider to guess who won and by how much in the 2024 presidential election — pick Harris or Trump and the margin. Get within ±5 percentage points to win. You have 7 attempts; wrong guesses reveal hints.

name: Babelle
description: Given a city's name and population, guess which country or territory it belongs to in 6 attempts. After each wrong guess, you see the distance in km, a compass direction, and a proximity percentage to the correct country.

name: Am I Dead?
description: Each day, guess whether 10 famous faces are alive or dead. For each celebrity, you see a portrait and a category hint; reveal additional clues at the cost of points. Set a wager (1x, 2x, or 3x) before answering — correct guesses earn points multiplied by your wager, wrong ones lose half. A bonus round follows each correct guess: place the birth or death year on a timeline for extra points.

name: Shrooms
description: A colored grid divided into regions. Place exactly 2 mushrooms in every row, every column, and every colored region — none touching, not even diagonally. Tap a cell to cycle through empty, grass (a "not here" marker), and mushroom. 3 sizes to choose from: Easy 8×8, Medium 10×10, and Hard 12×12, each a separate timed puzzle.

name: Lit Clues
description: 16 book titles are displayed in a 4×4 grid. Find 4 groups of 4 that share a hidden connection — same author, genre, theme, or a shared word. Select 4 tiles and hit Submit. Groups are colour-coded by difficulty (Easy to Expert); you get 4  mistakes before the game ends.

name: Music Clues
description: 16 song titles are displayed in a 4×4 grid. Find 4 groups of 4 that share a hidden connection — same artist, theme, or a shared word. Select 4 tiles and hit Submit. Groups are colour-coded by difficulty (Easy to Expert); you get 4 mistakes before the game ends.

name: Film Clues
description: Group 16 movie titles into 4 hidden categories by finding a shared connection between them. Select 4 tiles and submit — you get 4 mistakes before the game ends. Difficulty ranges from Easy to Expert.

name: Slideword
description: Slide whole rows and columns on a 5×5 letter grid until all 5 rows spell words horizontally — tiles wrap around so nothing is lost. Easy mode locks each solved row in place; Hard mode requires the entire grid to be solved at once. 5 clue bars below reveal each word on demand but add to your hint count. Your time is the score.

name: Luminary
description: 3 questions per round, each presenting a sentence clue and a lineup of 4 actor photos. Pick the actor that fits the clue and lock in. Some questions ask you to identify all matching actors from the set. 45 seconds per question, one shot, no retries. Score up to 3/3 and compete on the leaderboard.

name: HistoriaQuest
description: 3 challenges per day — Inventions, Figures, and Events. In each, drag 5 illustrated cards into chronological order from oldest to most recent and submit. Points are awarded for accuracy, with a streak multiplier up to +25%. All 3 challenge scores combine into a single leaderboard.

name: Anthropeum
description: Each round presents an artifact from the Metropolitan Museum of Art with multiple photos. Drop a pin on a world map to guess where it was made, then select a 250-year block on a timeline to guess when. Points are scored by proximity on both dimensions. 10 rounds per day; after finishing, see your score on a distribution curve against all players.

name: Endevimetro
description: Fill a 3×3 grid by naming Barcelona metro (TMB) and FGC stations that satisfy both the row and column conditions simultaneously — conditions like "on Line L7", "name with ≥10 letters", or "in the Horta-Guinardó district". Each station can only be used once, and you have 3 errors allowed.

name: MetrosQuest
description: Across 5 round types, you're shown a handful of world cities and a statistic — population, altitude, metro lines, skyscrapers, and the like — then pick the city that fits: the highest or lowest value, the one that breaks the running order, the one closest to a target number, or the odd one out of a group. It's a pure test of how well you know the world's major cities.

name: Nonodaily
description: Fill in the correct squares on a 12×12 grid using the number clues along each row and column — each clue gives the lengths of the consecutive filled runs in that line. Work it out by pure logical deduction, marking cells filled or crossed off, to reveal a hidden pixel-art picture.

name: Artifact Guesser
description: You're shown photos of a real museum artifact from several angles, then place its country of origin on a world map and estimate the year it dates to on a timeline spanning 3000 BC to the present. The closer your location and date guesses, the more points you score across 5 rounds, up to 1,000 total.

name: Capitrail
description: Navigate a 5-stop trail between world capitals: for each leg, set a compass bearing and estimate the distance from your current point to the target capital, then submit. Each round resumes from wherever your last guess landed rather than the true location, and points are scored on accuracy across all 5 rounds.

name: LinkyGrid - World Cup
description: Drag links between 6 footballer cards to find all 6 hidden connections — pairs who played with or against each other in a World Cup match. Wrong drags count as misses, hints are available, and the board comes in Easy and Hard. 1 of 5 link-finding modes alongside Wiki, Geo, Film, and Football grids.

name: Picguessr
description: Identify the mystery pop-culture character from a heavily zoomed-in image in 4 guesses — each wrong answer reveals more of the picture, and a first-try win earns the full 5 points. The pool spans 1,600+ characters across cartoons, TV series, movies, video games, manga & anime, and comics, with streaks, leaderboards, and extra classic and infinite modes.

name: Color Memory Game
description: A color flashes for 4 seconds, then vanishes — recreate it from memory with hue, saturation, and brightness sliders. 5 rounds, each scored 0–10 by perceptual color difference, up to 50 points. Everyone gets the same 5 colors, with one leaderboard run, streaks, country rankings, and 18 variants from speed and gradient to multiplayer rooms.

name: Macrodle
description: You get 5 foods, 1 per round. For each food, drag the handles around a dial to split 100 g into protein, fat, carbs, and other, then hit Check. The closer your split is to the food's real macros, the more of the round's 1000 points you earn — the true target bands are revealed after each guess. Score up to 5000 points and collect a star for every 1000, with 5 stars at 4000+.

name: Common Three
description: Place 7 words into the zones of a 3-circle Venn diagram whose 3 themes are hidden. Each word fits 1, 2, or all 3 of the secret categories. Hit Check to lock correct placements and send wrong ones back to the bank. Solve the full diagram within 5 checks to reveal the themes.

name: Peerkle
description: Rank 8 items along a given axis (such as height, population, or release year) from low to high in 5 tries. After each guess, every slot shows how close it is — in place, one slot off, or two or more off — so you can swap tiles and home in on the correct order.

name: Toadle
description: Guess a hidden 4-letter word in up to 10 tries. Each guess returns a single number — 2 points for every letter in the right place plus 1 point for every letter that is in the word but misplaced — and you deduce the answer purely from how that score shifts.

name: Quackle
description: On a 7×7 grid divided into irregular ponds, place ducks so each pond holds exactly the flock size shown in its corner. Within a pond the ducks must form one connected group, and ducks from neighbouring ponds can never sit edge to edge — only corner to corner.

name: Sumrex
description: On a 6×6 grid of digits split into six colour regions, place one marker per row, per column, and per region — none of them touching, even diagonally — so the 6 digits you cover add up to the given target.

name: Targle
description: A target number is shown and the 6-character equation that produces it is hidden. Guess valid equations in 6 tries; after each, every digit and operator turns teal (right spot), coral (right symbol, wrong spot), or grey (not used). Standard order of operations applies and any division must come out whole.

name: Foreign Trivia
description: Answer 5 multiple-choice trivia questions, each written in a different language. Tap any word to reveal its translation, then use the context to pick the correct answer; your 5 results combine into a single daily score.

name: Letter Griddle
description: Spell 5 words tied to a shared topic, ranging from 4 to 8 letters, by drawing from a common bank of scrambled letter tiles. Each word reveals one letter in place and offers an optional hint; place the tiles into the correct slots to complete all 5 words.

name: Lazy River
description: Trace a single continuous loop through every cell of the grid, building on the path segments already filled in. Drag to draw or erase the river and tap a cell to mark an X where the loop cannot pass.

name: Angle
description: You're shown a drawn angle and must estimate its size in degrees within 4 guesses; after each guess you're told whether the actual angle is higher or lower.

name: Chroma
description: Match a hidden target color by mixing three shades you choose and dialing each one's proportion in 5% steps. Submit a blend to see how close it lands, then use that feedback to home in on the exact color within 6 tries — no words, just a good eye.

name: Jumble
description: Rearrange a scrambled 5×5 waffle grid so all six interlocking words — three across, three down — read correctly. Tiles recolor after each move (green = right spot, yellow = right letter wrong spot, grey = not in that word) to guide you; swap any two tiles to solve it in 15 swaps or fewer, finishing with swaps to spare for a higher score.

name: Zigzag
description: Spell hidden 5-letter words by picking one letter from each column of a letter grid, left to right. Track down 10 plain words plus 10 clued bonus words (each with a dictionary-style definition) for a perfect 100; a soft timer clocks your speed but never ends the game.

name: TV-Addict
description: Identify a TV show from 5 plot clues revealed one at a time, starting vague and growing more obvious. Type a guess or skip to unlock the next clue; the earlier you nail it, the higher your score — 5 points on the first clue down to 1 on the last, and 0 if you miss them all.

name: Toon Tone Fun
description: You're shown a famous cartoon or anime character and must recreate one of its signature colors from memory: drag the hue, saturation, and brightness sliders to match the shade, then submit to see how close you got, scored by CIEDE2000 color distance (lower is better). Each game runs 5 rounds, drawn from a random mix of characters or a single franchise you pick.

name: Sokodle
description: A grid-based Sokoban puzzle: move your token around and push parcels — you can only push, never pull — onto the marked delivery zones. Deliver the required number of parcels (such as 3 of 5) in as few moves as possible, aiming to beat the puzzle's par.

name: Word Equation
description: Guess a hidden 5-letter word using only numerical feedback — after each guess you're told how many letters are in the correct position, with no color tiles or per-letter hints, so you solve it through logic and deduction in as few guesses as possible.

name: BlueBerry
description: Place berries on a 9×9 grid so that each row, column, and outlined region contains exactly the number of berries given by its clue. Use the totals around the grid and within each region to deduce where every berry  belongs, then check your solution.

name: LinkyGrid - Geo
description: Drag a bank of country cards into a grid so that each card sits adjacent only to countries it shares a link with — a land border, an official language, or a population within 25%. Check your layout to lock in valid connections, and solve the puzzle by finding all 5 links within 5 attempts. An Easy or Hard difficulty can be selected.

name: LinkyGrid - Film
description: Drag a bank of film cards into a grid so that each card sits adjacent only to films it shares a link with — a common cast member or the same writer. Check your layout to lock in valid connections, and solve the puzzle by finding all 5 links within 5 attempts. An Easy or Hard difficulty can be selected.

name: LinkyGrid - Wiki
description: Drag a bank of Wikipedia-topic cards into a grid so that each card sits adjacent only to other cards its Wikipedia page actually links to. Check your layout to lock in valid connections, and solve the puzzle by finding all 5 links within 5 attempts.

name: Globe Hoppr
description: Hop city to city across a world map, each turn jumping to any city within a fixed radius (1,000 km), and reach the target city in as few turns as possible. Ocean Portals let you leap across oceans to a linked exit city, while out-of-range guesses waste a turn without advancing you.

name: FilmLink
description: Start at one movie and reach a target movie by hopping through shared cast and crew — click an actor, director, or writer to jump to their filmography, then pick another of their films, repeating until you land on the target. Bridge the two films in as few links as possible.

name: Triplit
description: You're given 3 starting letters and 3 clues. Fill a pyramid by finding a 4-letter word, then a 5-letter word, then a 6-letter word. Each word must contain all the letters from the row above it plus exactly 1 new letter, and each word must match one of the 3 clues. The clues are shown in random order — figuring out which clue belongs to which row is part of the puzzle.

name: Shrinkle
description: You're given a set of words displayed as letter tiles. Click any letter to remove it — each removal must produce a valid English word, shrinking the word down one letter at a time. Work through all the words until they've been reduced enough to reveal the hidden phrase beneath. You have 3 mistakes; attempting a removal that doesn't form a valid word costs one.

name: Five in Five
description: A timed word-finding game on a 5×5 tile grid. Hidden words are scattered across the tiles and must be found in order of increasing length: 3, then 4, then 5, then 6, then 7 letters. Type any valid word to reveal matching tiles and add seconds to the clock, but only the exact hidden word advances you to the next round. Find all 5 before time runs out.

name: ClueDay
description: Guess the 6-letter mystery word of the day using written clue phrases and Wordle-style letter feedback. You start with 1 clue and can unlock up to 4 more — the fewer clues used, the better your score. Green means the letter is in the right position; orange means it's in the word but in the wrong spot. Common words only, no proper nouns.

name: LinguaBoard
description: Fill a 3×3 grid where each row and column carries a language category (origin family, geography, speaker count, cultural milestones like FIFA or UN membership). Each cell requires a language that satisfies both its row and column. You have 9 guesses shared across all 9 cells — wrong answers count against your total. Multiple correct answers exist per cell; rarer languages score higher.

name: AlphaGuess
description: Guess the word of the day using alphabetical position as your only feedback — each guess tells you whether the answer comes before or after it in the dictionary. Use binary-search-style deduction to zero in on the word.

name: WordGame o565
description: Select two letters in a straight line (horizontal or vertical) to form a 3–5 letter word — the selected letters are the first and last. You also get 10 swaps to reposition adjacent tiles. Find as many words as possible before you run out of swaps or usable letters.

name: Noun Sense
description: You're given 10 adjectives and must type the most common noun that follows each one. Scoring is frequency-based — popular pairings (like "Heavy" + "Rain") score high, obscure ones score 0. You get up to 3 retries on any 0-point answer.

name: LinkedIn Patches
description: Partition a grid into colored rectangular patches by expanding anchor pieces. Each piece has a shape constraint (square, wide rectangle, or tall rectangle) and may carry a number indicating its required cell count. Fill every cell of the grid without overlap to solve the puzzle.

name: MCdle Items
description: Guess the Minecraft item of the day by typing item names and receiving color-coded feedback on their attributes — green for correct, yellow for partial match, red for incorrect. Narrow it down with each guess.

name: MCdle Blocks
description: Guess the Minecraft block of the day by typing block names and receiving color-coded feedback on their attributes — green for correct, yellow for partial match, red for incorrect. Narrow it down with each guess.

name: MCdle Crafting Bee
description: Select Minecraft items from a honeycomb grid and drag them into the crafting slots to form valid recipes. Use only the given items to discover all 10 hidden crafting combinations.

name: Anagardens
description: A growing anagram ladder — each step gives you the letters from your previous answer plus a new mystery tile, and a clue to guide you. Rearrange all the letters to form the word matching the clue. The chain grows by 1 letter with every step.

name: Countle
description: Use 6 given numbers and the 4 arithmetic operations (+, −, ×, ÷) to reach a 3-digit target number. Each number can only be used once — you don't need to use all of them. Score is based on how close your solution gets to the target.

name: Parley
description: Guess 5 English words by tapping language flags to reveal translations and hear them spoken aloud. Each of 12 languages can only be used once across all 5 words, so choose strategically. Wrong guesses reveal letters. Fewer clues used = higher score (max 15).

name: AtomixQuest
description: Pick the correct element from a small set across 5 modes — find the maximum, minimum, the impostor that breaks an order, the value closest to a target, or the intruder outside a group — using real periodic-table data like atomic mass, melting point, and electronegativity.

name: Tennis Sportdle
description: Type any ATP or WTA tennis player's name to guess today's hidden player. Each guess returns colour-coded clues — country, playing hand, height, ranking, and birth year — with arrows showing whether the hidden player's numeric values are higher or lower than yours.

name: ABA League Sportdle
description: Type any ABA League basketball player's name to guess today's hidden player. Each guess returns colour-coded clues — club, position, height, season context, and birth year — with arrows showing whether the hidden player's numeric values are higher or lower than yours.

name: EuroLeague Sportdle
description: Type any EuroLeague basketball player's name to guess today's hidden player. Each guess returns colour-coded clues — club, position, height, season context, and birth year — with arrows showing whether the hidden player's numeric values are higher or lower than yours.

name: Premier League Sportdle
description: Type any Premier League footballer's name to guess today's hidden player. Each guess returns colour-coded clues — club, position, height, season context, and birth year — with arrows showing whether the hidden player's numeric values are higher or lower than yours.

name: NHL Sportdle
description: Type any NHL player's name to guess today's hidden player. Each guess returns colour-coded clues — team, position, height, season context, and birth year — with arrows showing whether the hidden player's numeric values are higher or lower than yours.

name: F1 Sportdle
description: Type any Formula 1 driver's name to guess today's hidden driver. Each guess returns colour-coded clues — constructor, position, height, season context, and birth year — with arrows showing whether the hidden driver's numeric values are higher or lower than yours.

name: NFL Sportdle
description: Type any NFL player's name to guess today's hidden player. Each guess returns colour-coded clues — team, position, height, and birth year — with arrows showing whether the hidden player's numeric values are higher or lower than yours.

name: NBA Sportdle
description:
Type any NBA player's name to guess today's hidden player. Each guess returns colour-coded clues — team, position, height, season context, and birth year —
   with arrows showing whether the hidden player's numeric values are higher or lower than yours. Most puzzles fall in 4–8 guesses.

name: Capitalibrate
description: Across 5 rounds you're given two world capitals — your starting city and a target. Set the compass bearing you'd head along the shortest globe route, then estimate the distance in km or miles. The closer your bearing and distance, the more points you score.

name: Daily
description: A puzzle hub that rotates through 6 mini brain teasers — Coin Maze, Traffic Jam, Tile Fit, Word Hunt, Air Hockey and Money Tycoon. Pick Casual mode to practice with unlimited tries, or Competitive to post a verified score on the global leaderboard. A separate 1v1 Arena pits you against another player and builds an Elo rating over time.

name: thingdle
description: A short riddle describes an everyday object — guess what it is in 6 tries. Each wrong guess fills a comparison row across 5 attributes (size, weight, parts, category, etc.) showing how close your answer is to the target, narrowing the field with every attempt. Two extra hints unlock along the way.

name: Gerrymandle
description: On a hex grid of populated tiles representing voters from different parties, group adjacent tiles into a set number of equally-sized connected districts. A party wins a district by holding the most voters in it; your goal is to draw the lines so your assigned party wins more districts than any other.

name: Story Sleuth
description: You get a one-line plot summary of a book and 6 attempts to guess its title from a searchable list. Extra clues unlock as you go: the decade after 3 wrong guesses, the author's initials after 4, and the title's word pattern after 5.

name: Gauntle
description: Race through a back-to-back gauntlet of 11 mini-puzzles — Wordy, Mini Crossword, Correl, Mini Sudoku, Queens, Minesweeper, Nonogram, Ratiole, Clambers, Chromal, and Shapeup — under a single running clock. Solving quickly earns time bonuses; skipping or failing adds penalties. Lowest total time wins.

name: Word Bunny
description: Transform a starting word into a target word by dragging letters from the keyboard to swap, add, or remove one letter at a time. Every step must form a valid word, no word can be reused, and the goal is to reach the target in as few moves as possible (try to beat par).

name: Coil
description: Build a chain of words starting from a seed word. Your first word must share at least 1 letter with the seed; each next word must share 1 more distinct letter than the last (2, then 3, and so on — repeats within a word don't count). Hit a chain of 6 to clear the puzzle; longer chains earn bonus tiers. Every turn is timed and everyone gets the same seed.

name: WayWord
description: Guess the 5-letter word in 6 attempts. Each position has its own wheel showing a range of still-possible letters; after every guess the ranges narrow to eliminate letters too high or low in the alphabet for that slot, while standard green/yellow/grey color hints flag correct, misplaced, and absent letters. Easy, Medium, and Hard modes adjust how much help the wheels give you.

name: Plot-Hole
description: Daily movie guessing game where 5 plot clues describe today's film, starting vague and getting more specific. Guess early for more points — Clue 5 is worth 5 points down to Clue 1 worth 1, and a skip or wrong guess reveals the next clue at the cost of a point. Free, no ads or account required.

name: TerraeQuest
description: Daily geography game with 4 country puzzles every day. Find the country with the highest or lowest value, spot the impostor that breaks the given order, or pick the one whose value is closest to a target. New round every 24 hours, with streaks and a monthly leaderboard.

name: StatesQuest
description: Compare US states across 7 cards in 4 challenges: pick the state with the maximum value for a given statistic, the minimum, the impostor that breaks the order, or the one closest to a target number. Statistics range from population to gun ownership rate.

name: Phraisins
description: Decode a hidden common phrase shown as a row of symbols, where each unique symbol stands in for a unique letter (cryptogram-style). A short riddle-style clue points you toward the answer. Type guesses with the on-screen keyboard and submit; reveal a letter via a hint at the cost of 1 raisin. Solve phrases to earn raisins toward the day's goal of 15.

name: Alibi
description: Read a set of always-true clues about a household to reconstruct where everyone was on a grid of rooms, where each room holds exactly one suspect and one piece of evidence. Clues give positional relationships — left of, above, next to, together, apart. Drag suspect and evidence chips into rooms to test theories, then tap a chip to lock it in; a wrong confirmation costs one of your 4 chances. Place every chip without contradicting a clue to close the case, and the room with the killer and weapon is flagged as the crime scene.

name: Tilerdle
description: Slide and rotate lettered tiles around a grid so their letters line up across dashed connectors and spell the day's themed words. When two tiles meet on a connector they get Wordle-style green/yellow/gray feedback showing which letters are correct; correctly aligned tiles snap together, and you win once every tile has merged into one connected piece.

name: Hunch
description: Guess a 5-letter word in 5 guesses. Instead of coloring the letter tiles like Wordle, Hunch returns 2 number clues after each guess: one tells you how many letters are in the correct position, the other how many correct letters are in the wrong position. You deduce the answer purely from those number tallies.

name: Deadlockle
description: Daily Wordle-style quiz for Valve's hero shooter Deadlock that challenges you to identify the day's mystery hero across 5 game modes. Classic gives you attribute-comparison tiles after each guess (green for a match, amber for close, red for off) to triangulate the answer, while Ability, Mugshot, Conversation, and Item reveal a gradually unblurred icon, a zooming-out portrait, or a voice clip until you crack it. New puzzles drop every day at midnight UTC.

name: recall.
description: Daily memory game built around active recall. Pick a mode (words, sentences,paragraph, twister, numbers, or custom text), add a modifier such as reverse, blind, flash, echo, or interference, then choose a difficulty from easy to brutal. You memorize the prompt for a short window, hide it, then type it back from memory and get scored on accuracy, word order, and speed. A daily challenge

name: Dicelex
description: Dicelex is a free daily word puzzle played on a 3D board of 16 rotating Boggle-style letter cubes. Press and hold a cube to start a word, drag across adjacent cubes (diagonals allowed) and release to submit. Valid dictionary words clear the chained cubes, and you can rotate a cube sideways to bring a different letter to the top. Clear all 16 cubes in 3 valid words or fewer to win, with a fresh puzzle published every day.

name: PhourWord
description: Daily word puzzle with 4 five-letter words arranged in a square, sharing corner letters. 4 corner letters are pre-filled; drag the remaining 12 from the center into the outer slots to spell each word. Unlimited guesses, but letters are worth fewer points each submission — solve it in one go for the max score. Hints and clues available.

name: Hop Connect
description:
Daily word-chain game. You get a START word and a GOAL word, then build a chain of related words
  (hops) where each new word has a clear connection to the previous one. Goal is to reach the target in as few hops as
  possible.

name: Rowdle
description: Daily word puzzle where you rebuild 5 scrambled 5-letter rows by swapping letters between them — rows matter, columns don't. Each tile shows green for a correct spot, yellow for the right row but wrong spot, and grey if it belongs elsewhere. Aim for 15 moves or fewer.

name: Sections
description: Daily number logic puzzle similar to Sudoku, but the grid is divided into horizontal and vertical sections by bars. Fill each section with numbers from 1 to its length with no repeats, where a length-3 section uses only 1, 2, 3. You get 3 mistakes per puzzle, and grids range from 3×3 to 9×9.

name: Wordlecup
description: Daily soccer player guessing game where you get 6 tries to identify a hidden footballer using 8 clues: league, club, nation, position, age, height, shirt number, and preferred foot. Each guess returns color-coded feedback with higher/lower arrows for numeric attributes, and basketball and NFL modes are available too.

name: Rebusly
description: Daily rebus puzzle drawn from today's news. You get 4 tries to decode the visual and name the phrase, where the answer hides in the position, size, quantity, or sound of what you see. Optional hints cost a try each, and a correct solve unlocks 4 curated news articles behind the puzzle.

name: Chain Which
description: Daily word chain puzzle where the first and last words are locked. Pick from a pool of words to fill the middle slots so every adjacent pair forms a compound word or phrase. You get 3 attempts and 2 hints to solve it.

name: Shabaash
description:
Daily word guessing game with a twist on Wordle. Guess the 4-letter word in 8 attempts or 5-letter word in 10 attempts. Instead of color-coded letter hints, you get two aggregate numbers per guess: how many letters are
  correctly placed and how many are correct but misplaced.

name: RNGdle
description: Daily random number game where you get 1 roll per day to generate a number from 0 to 1,000,000. Your number is analyzed for patterns like palindromes, primes, repeating digits, and sequences, earning you badges and entropy points to climb the leaderboard.

name: Centumth
description: Daily ranking puzzle where you get 5 guesses to name items ranked closest to #100 in today's category. Each guess scores points equal to its rank, with a max possible score of 490.

name: Daily Unfold
description: A daily spatial reasoning puzzle. You're shown how a piece of paper has been folded with a hole punched through it, then you tap on a grid to mark where those holes will appear once the paper is unfolded back flat.

name: TravelGuessr
description:
A daily geography game where you guess the location of 4 travel photos by placing a marker on a world map. Pan and zoom into each photo to spot clues, then drop your pin — the closer you are to the real spot, the more
  points you earn.

name: hisorty
description: A daily history puzzle where you drag and arrange 6 historical events into chronological order from earliest to latest. You get 3 attempts to nail the correct sequence.

name: Swapple!
description:
A daily logic puzzle where you transform a 4x4 colored grid into a target pattern by combining rows or columns. Combined cells follow an XOR-style rule, and column moves can't mix with row moves. Aim to match the target in
   as few moves as possible.

name: WordBattle
description: A daily 6-letter word guessing game where you have 6 attempts to solve the puzzle with color-coded feedback, and the same word drops at 00:00 UTC for every player worldwide.

name: Doctordle
description:
A daily medical diagnosis puzzle where you are given a short clinical scenario with patient symptoms and history, and must guess the correct diagnosis within 5
  attempts. Designed for medical students and professionals to test their clinical knowledge on a new case every day.

name: BERNIE Daily
description:
A daily car-pricing game where you guess the real auction sale price of 10 themed exotic cars using specs and Bernie's hints. Points are awarded based on guess
  accuracy and you can compete on a global leaderboard with a new session dropping every day at midnight.

name: Consonants
description:
A daily word puzzle where all vowels are pre-filled and you must guess theme-related words using 21 consonants. Solving one word reveals its consonants across the
  rest of the board, and you have 5 attempts before using hints costs a try.

name: Quipzle
description:
A daily phrase-guessing game where all vowels are revealed and you must figure out the consonants to complete the saying. You have 6 guesses, and feedback tiles
  indicate right consonants, right word, or not in phrase. Choose from Easy, Medium, or Hard difficulty.

name: erecTangled
description: erecTangled is a daily word-finding game where you swipe or type to discover words hidden in a rectangular letter grid. The grid expands in rings as you find more words. Words are scored by rarity — common, rare, ultra rare, and 3-letter. Find all 61 daily words or play unlimited mode.

name: Guess Hex
description: Guess Hex is a daily hex color code guessing game where you enter 6-digit hex codes and get feedback — green for exact, yellow for close, gray for wrong — with arrows showing direction. You have 6 attempts, with bonus turns for exact RGB channel matches. Features daily and unlimited modes.

name: Queen Sweep
description: Find 8 hidden queens on an 8×8 board using Minesweeper-style number clues. Numbers show how many queens are adjacent to each cell. Each row and column has exactly 1 queen, and queens can't be diagonally adjacent. Mark cells with X to eliminate them, then flag the queens to win. Features daily and unlimited modes.

name: recTangled
description: Find hidden words in a tangled grid of letters by swiping or typing. Words are scored by rarity: 3-letter (100pts), common (500pts), rare (1,000pts), and ultra rare (5,000pts). A new daily puzzle with a set number of words to discover. Supports adjustable grid sizes and multiplayer.

name: anoun
description: Guess the hidden noun in 20 attempts. Every wrong guess reveals traits it shares with the hidden word, like common letters, syllable count, or category. Use these clues to deduce the answer. A new word every day at midnight.

name: Cadgy
description: Find 5-letter words by picking exactly 1 letter from each column of a grid. There are 10 basic words to find on your own and 10 bonus words with clues provided. Letters turn gold once you've found every word that uses them. A new human-edited puzzle every day, with score sharing and an archive of past puzzles.

name: Bookidle
description: A daily book guessing game with 2 modes: identify a book from its blurred cover, or guess the title using clues like publication year, genre, and page count. A new challenge every day with an archive of past puzzles.

name: Typecasted
description:
A daily movie connection game inspired by Six Degrees of Kevin Bacon. In Endless mode, build the longest chain of films and
  actors before time runs out. In Make the Cut, connect 2 films through shared cast members in 5 links or fewer. New challenges daily with
  leaderboards.

name: ClashRoyaleDLE
description: A daily Clash Royale guessing game with 5 modes: Classic (compare 8 card attributes), Pixel (identify a pixelated card image), Emoji (decode emoji clues), Description (reveal words one by one), and Higher or Lower (compare elixir costs). 4 daily challenges plus unlimited play.

name: Tessera
description: A daily stained glass puzzle inspired by Nonograms and Minesweeper. Fill clear panes with the correct colors using numbered clues at the corners that indicate how many adjacent panes share that color. Features a colorblind mode, timer, and beginner puzzles.

name: Sift
description: Filter a daily word set by selecting letters to split words into groups. Use up to 5 letter filters to separate words optimally. Features 3 difficulty modes with hidden Sift words and objective word groups that must stay together.

name: Blackjack Smack
description: Play 21 hands of blackjack against a grumpy dealer in the daily challenge and compete for leaderboard rankings. Features practice mode and dealer commentary. No real money gambling.

name: 24 game
description: Combine 4 random numbers using basic arithmetic operations (+, -, *, /) and parentheses to make exactly 24. Each number must be used once. Features daily challenges, time attack mode, and a solver tool.

name: WardleGame
description: Guess the daily War Thunder vehicle (tank, aircraft, or naval) using attribute clues. Color-coded feedback on country, class, speed, and battle rating. Multiple modes and streak tracking.

name: Seeds
description: Chain 5 words together where they overlap. Score points based on shared letters. Daily starting word and letter. Beat your best score.

name: Gridella
description: Navigate a hidden grid to spell a 9-letter target word. Only see neighboring letters. Wrong turns reset you to the start. Memory and pathfinding required.

name: WoWDoku
description: Fill a 3x3 grid with World of Warcraft raid bosses matching specific criteria. Find the rarest answers to score low. 9 guesses, no repeats allowed.

name: ROWTATE
description: Shift wrapping rows and columns to align the target 5-letter word in the center. Tiles loop infinitely. Solve in minimum moves.

name: World Clue
description: Guess 3 secret countries in the daily challenge using hints from geography, economy, politics, and culture. Each round reveals 3 new data-based clues. You have 6 lives.

name: ParseWord
description: Solve daily cryptic word puzzles using linguistic transforms like replacements and containers to parse hint words into the solution

name: VocabPop
description: Guess the correct definition of a daily unusual word from 4 options. Only one meaning is real.

name: Magnitudle
description: Estimate the answer to a daily trivia question using real-world numbers. Your score is based on how many orders of magnitude you're off.

name: HURGLE
description: Guess the filthy, weird, or horrible nerd word in 6 tries. After each guess, tile colors show how close you are to the answer.

name: Gap It
description: Place letter tiles with directional arrows to bridge START to END, spelling a valid word. Each tile unlocks adjacent cells based on its arrows. Find the longest word path. Daily puzzle with 2 modes: Bridge and Slide.

name: Word Pizza
description: Build words from tip to crust, where each word must start with the last letter of the previous word and grow by one letter each row. Use fixed pepperoni letters and score bonus points with daily topping letters. Reach 170 points to save your streak.

name: CHN LNK
description: Complete a vertical chain of connected words by guessing letters. Vowels disabled until other letters are found. Start with 5 lives, earn up to 5 stars daily and compete on the monthly leaderboard.

name: Number Crunch
description: Click squares to increase numbers (1-9, wrapping to 1). When 3+ adjacent squares match, they pop. Clear all numbers in the fewest moves possible. Leftover squares add 3 to your score. Daily puzzle.

name: Syllabyte
description: Tap syllables to form words based on clues. Each daily puzzle has 5 words with 4 attempts each. Color-coded results show accuracy (Perfect to 3+ miss). Features hints, shuffle, and timer. 3 difficulty modes: Warm-Up, Daily, and Hard.

name: WordZig
description: Connect adjacent hexes to form words and clear the entire board. Words must be at least 2 letters long, with longer words scoring more points (exponentially). Daily puzzle with 5 board sizes from Small (19 hexes) to Insane (127 hexes).

name: Logic Grid Puzzles
description:
Solve daily logic grid puzzles using deductive reasoning to match attributes across categories. Given clues, fill the grid to determine which
  person has which characteristics. 6 difficulty levels from Very Easy to Ultra Hard.

name: Chains
description: Rearrange actors and movies to create a connected chain. Each actor must link to a movie they appeared in. Color-coded feedback shows connections: green (both sides), red (below), blue (above). Complete the chain in the fewest moves possible.

name: Hot and Cold
description: A daily word game where you guess the secret word using semantic similarity feedback. Each guess receives a rank showing how close you are - the lower the number, the closer you are. Use hot and cold clues to narrow down the target word.

name: Daily 6
description: A Wordle-style game with 6-letter words instead of 5. Guess the daily word in 6 tries using color-coded feedback. Features 2 puzzles per day - a morning puzzle and an evening puzzle.

name: Letter Spin
description: A daily word puzzle where you connect adjacent letters in a 4x4 grid to form words. Find all 51 words ranging from 4 to 8 letters, with the challenge of discovering a special 8-letter super word. Use the spin feature to rotate the grid for a fresh perspective.

name: Tally
description: Connect up to 4 adjacent numbers that sum to 10. Find the only solution that clears the entire board without leftovers. Paths longer than 4 are invalid. 5 mistakes allowed per game.

name: Crossword Club
description: Daily crossword puzzles with varying difficulty levels. Features classic crossword gameplay with clues for across and down answers. New puzzles published every day by different constructors.

name: Moby-Dordle
description: Find which chapter a unique word appears in Moby-Dick. The word is used exactly once in the novel. Guess the chapter number, and the game reveals more context after each guess, telling you if you're too high or too low. 6 guesses allowed.

name: Keysmash
description: Fill in missing vowels to complete words related to the puzzle's theme. Consonants are given, and you use the keyboard to add the correct vowels. All words relate to the daily theme. Y counts as a vowel.

name: Shapes
description: Arrange geometric pieces to form a silhouette. Tap a piece to select it, rotate using the ring, then drag and drop into place. A Tangram-style puzzle where you combine shapes to create pictures.

name: Waywords
description: Find and connect words in a letter grid to create a path from top to bottom. Words can go across or down (not diagonally) and all relate to the puzzle's theme. Emojis represent words. Includes decoy words that reveal hint letters when found.

name: Starstruck
description: Place 1 star in each row, column, and colored region of the grid. Stars cannot touch each other, not even diagonally. Tap cells to mark with X (can't be a star) or place a star. Features 2 difficulty levels (easy, hard).

name: Sudoku
description: Fill a 9x9 grid with numbers 1 to 9 so each number appears once in every row, column, and 3x3 block. Select cells and fill in numbers using the number pad. Features 3 difficulty levels (easy, medium, hard), hints, undo, and notes mode.

name: Crossover
description:
A daily crossword puzzle where you swap letters and emojis to solve clues. Select letters at the edge to view clues
  for rows or columns. Letters turn green when correctly placed. Emojis represent words and can be swapped like regular letters.

name: Jigsaw
description:
Drag jigsaw pieces together to complete an image. Pieces snap together when in the right place. New
  pieces appear after placing all available pieces.

name: Bonza
description:
Drag letter pieces together to form words that connect to the puzzle theme. Pieces snap together when
   complete, creating a crossword jigsaw.

name: Quizmoji
description:
Match 2 emojis with each text clue. Select from available emoji tiles to complete all clues. Limited
  guesses.

name: Wordloop
description:
Arrange word segments on a board to form a loop. Each pair of adjacent segments must create a valid
  word when read clockwise.

name: Dodeku
description:
Drag number tiles onto a grid to match row and column sums with target numbers on the perimeter.
  Press and hold to lock tiles.

name: Wordsmyth
description:
Transform words step-by-step using clues. Operations include remove, inject, append, change, anagram,
   and reverse. Daily puzzle with competitive and casual modes.

name: RINARIN
description:
Uncover 4 intersecting words using provided letters. Click RIN to lock correct letters in place.
  Limited attempts. Daily puzzle.

name: Definedle
description:
Write dictionary-style definitions for words in 15 words or fewer. Scored on key concepts, precision,
   and detail out of 100 points.

name: Three Letters Game
description: Form words from 3 letters where the first starts the word and the second appears before the third. Words must be 3-15 letters and Scrabble-valid. 3 lives, Scrabble scoring.

name: Dialed
description: A color memory game where you are shown 5 colors for a few seconds, then must recreate each one as accurately as possible using a color picker. Play solo, challenge friends in multiplayer, or take on the daily challenge where everyone on Earth gets the same 5 colors. Easy and hard difficulty available.

name: Infixion
description: A daily word game where you find 4 unique words all containing the same daily letter string (Infix) anywhere in the word. Letters score points based on rarity, repeated letters are worth less each time, and using the Infix more than once earns a big bonus. Compete on the global leaderboard and unlock badges as you play.

name: Swapdle
description: A daily crossword puzzle where you swap color-coded letters into their correct positions within a limited number of moves. Color hints guide you — green is correct, orange means right word but wrong spot, purple means it belongs in a connected word. 4 difficulty levels from EASY to CRUEL, with a new puzzle daily and an unlimited mode.

name: Shikaku
description: A daily logic puzzle where you divide a grid into rectangles by dragging — each rectangle must contain exactly one number equal to its area. Features a timer, hints, and undo, with a new puzzle every day.

name: Wordless Online
description:
Guess words from 3 to 8 letters in 6 tries. Color-coded hints show if letters are
  correct (green), in the word but wrong position (yellow), or not in the word (gray). Adjustable
  difficulty with customizable word lengths.

name: Waffle 2
description: Swap letters in a 5x5 waffle-shaped grid to form correct words horizontally and vertically. You have 15 moves to solve the puzzle using color-coded hints. Earn up to 5 stars based on moves remaining.

name: Stackronym
description: Guess 1 horizontal word and 5 vertical words in 6 tries. The twist: vertical words must start with each letter of the horizontal word. Wordle-style color feedback helps you solve all 6 interconnected words.

name: SortWise
description:
Drag 6 cards onto a timeline in chronological order. Each correctly placed card
  earns stars. Get 3 stars to win. Daily puzzle featuring companies, events, or historical moments.

name: Tightrope Game
description: Answer unlimited trivia questions across multiple categories with 3 lives. Each wrong answer costs a life, but 2 correct answers in a row restores 1 life. See how long you can stay balanced on the tightrope.

name: Raddle
description:
Transform one word into another by changing 1 letter at a time to form a word
  ladder. Solve the puzzle using clues given in random order, with themes tied to current events or
  holidays.

name: Gridle
description:
Guess how polyomino shapes pack into a 4x4 grid in 6 attempts. After each guess,
  tile colors show how close you are to the solution, like Wordle but with spatial puzzles.

name: Scrandle
description:
Compare 2 football stadium foods from around the world and guess which one was
  rated higher by @FootyScran followers. Daily challenge based on real stadium food ratings.

name: Gridogram
description:
Swipe adjacent letters in a grid to form words that reveal a daily hidden quote.
  Find the required words from an alphabetized list to complete the puzzle.

name: Framedle
description: Daily Warframe guessing game. Guess the Warframe character in 6 tries using clues about gender, variant, playstyle, health, shield, progenitor element, and release year.

name: Owdle
description:
Daily Overwatch guessing game. Guess the hero and get color-coded clues about their
   species, role, continent, and affiliations with each attempt.

name: Waffle UK
description:
Swap letters on a waffle-shaped 5x5 grid to form 6 intersecting words. Color-coded
  tiles guide your moves. Solve the puzzle in 15 swaps or fewer, with 10 swaps earning a perfect
  5-star score. Phonetic cues and UK English spellings tailored for en-GB players.

name: AI Faces Challenge
description:
Daily challenge where you guess which 2 celebrities are blended into an
  AI-generated portrait. You have 5 attempts to identify both celebrities.

name: Free Trivia
description:
Daily trivia platform with 10 handpicked questions each day, plus a daily movie
  guessing game. Choose from various categories and difficulty levels.

name: Pangramathon
description:
Find 3 pangrams (words using all given letters at least once) in the daily puzzle.
  Letters can be reused. Compete with friends for the fastest time.

name: Pivot the Game
description:
Rotate 2x2 letter blocks around pivot dots to spell a 4-letter word in the center
  row. Solve the daily puzzle in as few moves as possible.

name: Spelling Riddle
description:
Solve crossword-style riddles using visual hints and a set of letters. Form words
  with the required center letter to complete multiple daily puzzles.

name: Scrokkle
description:
A crossword-style poker puzzle where you place playing cards on a grid to form
  poker hands horizontally and vertically. Use multiplier tiles to maximize your score.

name: Chute
description:
A word puzzle where you drag letters from the bottom row to form words in a grid.
  Letters drop down after each word is found. Clear the board using as few UNDOs as possible.

name: Daily Brain
description:
Play 3 mini brain games daily, each taking under a minute. Complete pattern
  sequences, test your logic skills, and get a score out of 100 to share with friends.

name: Catfishing
description: Guess the Wikipedia article from its categories. 10 interesting people, places, and things to guess every day.

name: Locabulary
description:
Identify the daily mystery country by chaining countries together. Each country must start with any letter from the previous
  country's name. Follow temperature hints (Hot, Warm, Cold) to navigate toward the target. Score based on shortest chain.

name: Puzzleship - Zebra Puzzles
description:
Daily zebra puzzle featuring logical deduction. Match multiple attributes (names, colors, professions, preferences) to their correct
  positions using systematic reasoning. Multiple difficulty levels from very easy to ultra-hard. Archive access available.

name: Puzzleship - Logic Puzzles
description:
Daily logic puzzle collection featuring 6 puzzle types: Einstein Riddles, House Puzzles, Codebreaker, Crack the Code, Zebra Puzzles,
  and more. Deduce relationships and match attributes through logical reasoning. Multiple difficulty levels from very easy to ultra-hard.

name: Verbicular
description:
Fill a 5x5 grid using available letters to form valid English words both horizontally and vertically. Pre-filled letters provide
  clues. All word segments (2+ letters) must be valid. Daily puzzle with hints available.

name: Oddest 1 Out
description:
Find the odd word out in 4 rows of 4 words each. The 4 odd words form a new puzzle where 3 share a hidden connection - identify the
  Oddest of the Odds. 3 strikes allowed.

name: Pell Puzzles
description:
Fill a 6x6 grid with 8 paths of lengths 1-8. Connect X to O for each path, avoiding 2x2 blocks and self-touching paths. Daily puzzle
  with timer.

name: Clue Raider
description:
Place explorers on the map using logical clues to find the hidden relic. Each explorer has position hints that must be satisfied.
  Daily puzzle with new challenges.

name: Flickle.co
description:
Identify the daily movie or TV show from 6 progressive frames. Separate puzzles for movies and TV shows. Each solution includes
  detailed cinematography analysis covering lighting, composition, and color.

name: Cyphr
description:
Decode a pyramid of words by cracking the substitution cipher. Each number represents a letter - guess correctly to unlock the next
  row. 26 guesses maximum. New daily puzzle at midnight.

name: Shuffled
description:
Rearrange scrambled letters to complete crossword-style grids within a limited number of moves. 3 daily puzzles available, with
  letters locking in place when correct. New puzzles every day at 6:00 AM UTC.

name: Vocabr
description:
Daily vocabulary quiz where you match 5 words with their correct definitions from 4 multiple-choice options. New puzzle every day at 
  midnight.

name: WordPyramid
description: Free daily word puzzle game. Each answer is one letter longer than the last and uses all previous letters. Crossword clues with some cryptic. Includes achievements and tracked stats.

name: Wordfive
description: A mix of word search and sudoku. Fill in 5 blank spaces in a grid to make 5 five-letter words.

name: Terraformation
description: Fill in the hex grid planet with the correct terrains.

name: Stacks
description: Stack words from the word bank to create new words going horizontally. (From The Atlantic)

name: Weddle
description: Guess the NFL player within 8 guesses.

name: Wowdle
description: A collection of daily games related to World of Warcraft.

name: Snapdle
description: Guess the card from the game Marvel Snap.

name: Wallstreetle
description: Guess the company based on information about its stock.

name: TimeSwipe
description: Guess if the event occurred before or after the given year. There are 10 events each day.

name: Word to your Mother
description: Guess all possible Wordle words based on the two starting words and their results.

name: Truncate
description: Place a chain of tiles on the board and reach the opponent's base before they reach yours.

name: Word Ladder
description: Change one word into another by switching one letter at a time, keeping a valid word at each step.

name: Totem Words
description: Guess the words associated their emoji category, then slide those words to solve the vertical category.

name: word.golf
description: Link the starting word to the target word by choosing related words from the grid. 5 rounds per day.

name: Spelling Bee (Lessgames)
description: Spell the words based on their pronunciation. Optionally get a definition or use it in a sentence.

name: Wordcrux
description: A mini crossword puzzle, but don't make too many wrong guesses.

name: Umadle
description: A collection of daily guessing games related to Umamusume.

name: Stacked
description: Find groups of different sizes that share something in common.

name: Spot the differences
description: Spot all of the differences in the two pictures.

name: WordLink
description: Rearrange the words to form a chain of two-word phrases.

name: Wordamid
description: Solve the daily word pyramid by guessing words of increasing length.

name: Timeline
description: Guess the year for each of the 6 historical events.

name: Squirdle Daily
description: Guess today's pokemon within 9 guesses.

name: Royaledle
description: A collection of daily games related to Clash Royale.

name: Streetfighterdle
description: Guess the daily Street Fighter character in as few tries as possible.

name: Vox Daily Crossword
description: A free daily crossword from Vox, skips Sundays.

name: Wordcell
description: Handcrafted and thematic puzzles. Launch the ball around the board to collect letters and compose the hidden words.

name: Tiler
description: Assemble tiles with unique designs to recompose intertwined words. Play in English, or learn French words as well!

name: Zeldle
description: A collection of daily games related to Zelda.

name: WhichWay
description: Determine which direction the target country is from the starting country, 10 rounds daily.

name: VideoPuzzle
description: Swap tiles to unscramble the puzzle of a looping short video.

name: Worpel
description: Guess the player in the Australian Football League (AFL).

name: Redividers
description: Find the word that fits the first blank, then split it to fill in the remaining blank(s).

name: Revealed
description: Guess the daily topic based on its description with redacted words.

name: Three Magic Words
description: Place letters in the empty spaces to form 3 words. Five rounds per day.

name: Wordfall
description: Clear letters on the board by finding words, ending with as few letters as possible.

name: Tiled Words
description: Move and rotate tiles to find clues, connect words, and rebuild a broken crossword.

name: Terradle
description: Guess today's weapon from the game Terraria.

name: Warbl
description: Guess the name of the song that is playing backwards!

name: WhenTaken Movies
description: Guess where and when the given movie scene was filmed.

name: The Guardian - Quick Crossword
description: A small crossword puzzle from The Guardian. New puzzle 6 days a week.

name: SetFury
description: Find valid sets of 3 to 5 tiles by moving through the grid.

name: Seadle
description: Guess the sea of the day in as few attempts as possible.

name: TF2dle
description: Guess the Team Fortress 2 weapon, map, cosmetic or unusual effect based on attributes.

name: Stat Mini Crossword
description: A weekday mini crossword that's often health and medicine focused.

name: Spellify
description: Guess the daily card from Magic The Gathering after choosing up to 10 letters to reveal.

name: Sudoker
description: Rearrange the cards to create better Poker hands and maximize scores across rows and columns.

name: Word Box
description: Swap letters until each row and column forms a valid word.

name: Weather Darts
description: Guess cities whose current temperatures  add up to the daily target. If you go over, you bust!

name: Wantedle
description: Find the 'WANTED' character among all of the moving characters on the screen.

name: Viewdle
description: Guess the country based on the view.

name: Rivadle
description: A bunch of daily games where you guess the character from Marvel Rivals.

name: Rankle
description: Rank 6 things in 4 guesses. Every day is a different category.

name: Wordgy
description: Guess all five missing words by forming two-word phrases or compound words with the word below each tile.

name: Top 5
description: Guess the top 5 items of today's category.

name: Threepeat
description: Complete three words with the same three letters, three rounds everyday.

name: Stars
description: Distribute stars strategically across the grid without letting them touch.

name: The Daily Spell
description: Unscramble the fictional headline by dropping letters into place.

name: steamdle.com
description: Guess the game based on the Steam review.

name: Word Salad
description: Find all the words in the 4 by 4 grid that are part of today's theme. Refresh after doing the tutorial to get to the daily.

name: Wridges
description: Race the clock by spelling words in the hex grid starting from the bottom row.

name: trms
description: Restore the vowels in each clue to find answers that reduce to the same consonants. Try the "How to Play"!

name: TimeLine Game
description: Arrange the historical events in the order they happened.

name: Spiredle
description: Guess the daily Slay the Spire card.

name: Treasure Guessr
description: Narrow down a location on the world map.

name: Temple
description: Guess a duration or tempo by watching a flashing light, or give a duration or tempo by clicking.

name: Stackdown
description: Clear the stack of letters by finding each of the 5-letter words.

name: riddl.ing
description: Guess the answer to the handmade daily riddle in five clues.

name: Washington Post Crossword
description: A daily crossword from the Washington Post

name: Zeldadle
description: Test your Zelda knowledge in these daily games.

name: Real Bird Fake Bird
description: Guess if each of the 7 prompts are real or fake (made up or don't belong).

name: Spectra
description: Sort items by discovering the hidden metric.

name: Wordspan
description: Guess the 5-letter word based on where adjacent letters relatively appear in the alphabet.

name: Rewordio
description: Move stacks of letters between columns to solve the clues.

name: Traindle
description: Chain together words to form familiar phrases. Timed based word game.

name: The Atlantic Crossword
description: A daily crossword from The Atlantic.

name: Spongedle
description: Guess the episode from Spongebob Squarepants based on the screenshots.

name: Retro Game Trivia
description: Daily games where you guess the retro game that was released on this date in history.

name: TFTdle
description: Daily games related to Teamfight Tactics.

name: Stewardle
description: Guess the daily F1 driver.

name: Stardewdle
description: Guess today's mystery crop from Stardew Valley.

name: SatZoom
description: Guess the city based on the satellite image.

name: Ripple
description: Guess the ripple effect of historical events.

name: Wrodeo
description: Reveal the quote or book passage by guessing one word at a time, starting with some letters already shown.

name: Sporcle Daily Acrostic
description: A daily acrostic puzzle from Sporcle.

name: Smixed
description: Make increasingly longer words using the given 6 letters, each word starting with a different letter.

name: ZoomOut
description: Guess the video game from the zoomed-in screenshot.

name: Sequences
description: Guess the next number in today's sequence.

name: words for days
description: A word alchemy game with a daily objective, like infinite craft.

name: Weakdle
description: Guess the Pokemon type based on its weaknesses to the attacking types.

name: Valodle
description: Test your Valorant knowledge in these daily games.

name: Sortdle
description: Sort letters into tubes to form the hidden words without running out of moves.

name: WrestlePlay
description: A collection of daily games related to wrestling.

name: Wildlife Sudoku
description: Guess 9 animals that properly fill in the grid.

name: WRDLINK
description: Link the starting word to the ending word by changing one letter at a time. 3 rounds daily.

name: Swapple
description: Swap letters such that every row and column is a word.

name: Silksongdle
description: Daily guessing games related to Hollow Knight: Silksong.

name: Ronin
description: Fill each region with Chess pieces such that no piece can attack a piece of the same type.

name: Shuffalo
description: Make a word using all the letters on the wheel, adding a new letter after each correct guess.

name: SatPin
description: Pin the world locations on the map based on satellite images.

name: Wormle
description: Worm your way through the grid to spell today's themed words.

name: The New Daily - Trivia
description: Daily trivia quizzes from multiple categories.

name: SongSwipe
description: Guess if the song was released before or after the given year. There are 10 songs each day.

name: Tarkovdle
description: Guess the weapon from Escape from Tarkov by its properties or sound.

name: Refiner
description: Refine the numbers in the grid by grouping them based on each of the requirements.

name: Tracell
description: Uncover the hidden text by placing the letter tiles in the grid.

name: Talldle
description: Sort the famous people from shortest to tallest.

name: Stardle
description: Wordle except the secret word is related to Astronomy in some way.

name: Timingle
description: Try to time when the countdown reaches 0. Each day the beat is different.

name: Runedle
description: Guess today's Runescape NPC.

name: Timdle
description: Place 8 historical events in chronological order.

name: Sexaginta-quattuordle
description: Solve 64 Wordle puzzles at the same time.

name: Weakdoku
description: Fill out the grid with Pokémon based on the weaknesses described in each cell's row and column.

name: The Daily Burgle
description: Burgle the vault by guessing movies whose plot descriptions contain words from the vault! By CineNerdle.

name: Framedle.org
description: Guess the Warframe of the day.

name: FlashPopTiles
description: Traverse the grid while changing either shape or color, never both!

name: Monster Hunter-dle
description: Guess the monster from the Monster Hunter series.

name: LA Times Crossword
description: Solve today's crossword from the Los Angeles Times.

name: GeoConnections

description: Get 6 chances to guess a country based on their flag.

name: Fibble
description: Get 9 chances to guess a 5-letter word. There is a lie in each guess.

name: Actorle
description: Guess an actor based on their movies. Each time you guess an actor who starred in one of the movies, that movie's title will be revealed.

name: Absurdle
description: Guess a 5-letter word in unlimited number of attempts, with each guess, Absurdle reveals as little information as possible, changing the secret word if need be.

name: Worldle
description: Guess the country by its shape on the world map in 6 guesses.

name: Nerdle
description: Find the 8-digit calculation in 5 guesses.

name: Mathler
description: Try to find the hidden calculation that equals a given number in 6 guesses.

name: Dordle
description: Guess 2 5-letter words in 7 attempts.

name: Wordle
description: Get 6 chances to guess a 5-letter word.
